description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and large, grid-style windows dominating the exterior, allowing for ample natural light. The facade is clad in light-colored brick, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The main entryway is accentuated by an arched doorway with a glass canopy above, flanked by symmetrical window arrangements. The interior layout is open and spacious, with visible rooms including bedrooms, a living area, and a study, all separated by white partition walls and wooden flooring. The rear of the house includes a set of double doors opening to a large, open room, possibly a living or communal space. Minimal exterior ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines reinforce the modern architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large grid windows, light brick exterior, and an arched glass-canopied entryway. The design emphasizes open interiors and geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with an arched door, glass canopy, and symmetrical large windows.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, additional windows, and a glimpse of interior room layouts.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting double doors opening to a large room and more grid-style windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing fewer windows and the arrangement of interior partitions.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main door with a glass canopy, no steps, and minimalistic modern detailing
